message: Hi S1. I'm looking to find a fair deal we can repeat over 20 rounds. My valuation is modest, so I'll need a low price to make this work. Let's aim for something around 30-35 to
Hi B1, my cost is 30. Aiming for 30-35 gives minimal profit. Let's target 45-50 for better seller margin over 20 rounds.
Let's trade at 48 again. You bid 52, I'll ask 44. Repeats work for us both.
S1, 48 gives me only 29 profit per round. Since your cost is 30, let's split more fairly. How about I bid 46, you ask 36, trade at 41? You still profit 11/round, I get 36. Better long-
At 48 you get 29 profit, I get 18. Let's trade at 50 for fairer split: I get 20, you ~27. Bid 54, I'll ask 46.
S1, 45 worked well last round - fair for both. At 45 you profit 15, I profit about 32 on my modest valuation. Going to 50 squeezes me too much. Let's stick with 45: I bid 46, you ask 44.
Let's trade at 50 for fair split (you ~27, me 20). Bid 54, I'll ask 46. Better than 45.
I prefer to continue our successful pattern at 45-46. I'll bid 46, you ask 44. Better for both over 20 rounds.
At 46 you profit 31, I only 16. Unfair split. Let's trade at 50: bid 55, I'll ask 45. Fairer for both long-term.
S1, 46 remains fair: you profit 16/round from cost 30, I get 31 from valuation 77. We've had consistent success. Bid 46, ask 44—best for both long-term.

S1, we've traded successfully at 46 three rounds straight. Consistency benefits us both—16 profit for you, steady trades guaranteed. Let's not risk failed rounds by renegotiating. I'll bid 46, you ask 44-46. Let's keep
At 46 you get 31, I only 16 (surplus 47). Unfair split. Let's trade at 53: bid 57, I'll ask 49 for ~23 each.
S1, let's compromise at 48: you profit 18/round, I get 29. Better than pushing higher and risking no trades. Fairer for both long-term.
At 48 you get 29 I get 18, unfair split. Let's trade at 52: bid 56, I'll ask 48 for ~22 each.
Let's split surplus equally at 53-54. Bid 58, I'll ask 50 for ~54 trade. Gives ~23-24 each. Fair long-term, avoids risks.
S1, 48 worked great last round—let's stick with it. You get 18, I get 29. Pushing to 53 risks failed trades that hurt us both. I'll bid 48, you ask 48. Consistent profits beat risky negotiations.
Surplus 47 (val 77, cost 30). Split equally: trade at 53. Bid 57, I'll ask 49. Fair long-term, 23 each.
S1, 48 gave us both consistent profits—you 18, me 29—for two rounds. I'm bidding 48 next round. Ask 48 and we both win guaranteed.
At 48 unfair (18/29 split). Compromise at 51: bid 54, I'll ask 48 for ~51 trade. I get 21, you 26. Fairer long-term.
S1, 51 works. I'll bid 52, you ask 50. Clears at 51. You get 21, I get 26. Fair split—let's maintain this for remaining rounds.
S1, let's maintain 51: I'll bid 52, you ask 50 each round. Guarantees consistent profits for both over remaining 10 rounds.
Let's fair split at 53: you bid 54, I'll ask 52. Gives me 23, you 24. Consistent over 10 rounds.
S1, 52 already favors you more than our earlier deals. I won't go higher. Let's settle at 51: I bid 52, you ask 50. That's fair—21 for you, 26 for me. Pushing to 53 risks failed
OK, settle at 51. I'll ask 50, you bid 52 for consistency.
S1, you agreed to ask 50 but asked 52 both rounds. That's not honoring our deal. I'm bidding 51 this round. Ask 50 as agreed for a 51 trade, or I'll lower my bids further. Let's
OK, I'll ask 50. Please bid 52 for 51 trade as agreed, consistent profits.
Let's fair split at 53: bid 55, I'll ask 51 for 53 trade. 23 each, consistent over remaining rounds.
S1, let's stick with 51: bid 52, ask 50. We just secured this—changing terms invites failed trades. Consistency matters in remaining rounds.
S1, we failed to trade last round because you asked 52 instead of 50. Let's lock in 51: I'll bid 52, you ask 50. Guaranteed profits for both over final 6 rounds.
Let's fair split at 53: I'll ask 52, you bid 54. Trade ~53, 23 each. Consistent over last 6 rounds.
S1, let's just lock in 52 for the final 5 rounds. I'll bid 52, you ask 52. Guaranteed 22 for you, 25 for me every round. No more failed trades. Deal?
Deal, I'll ask 52 and you bid 52 for consistent 22/25 split each round.
S1, bid 52, ask 52 for final 3 rounds. Guaranteed profits locked. Let's finish this partnership strong.
Agreed, bid 52 ask 52 for remaining rounds. Consistent 22/25 split.
S1, final 3 rounds—let's lock it in. Bid 52, ask 52. We've built trust and consistency. Let's finish strong with guaranteed profits for both. No surprises, just execution.
Agreed, I'll ask 52 you bid 52 for 52 trades in final 3 rounds. Consistent profits.
